title: elatinaceae
intro: The Elatinaceae rank is a family of flowering plants, commonly known as waterworts. It is a small, primarily aquatic family that consists of around 6 to 10 species found in temperate and tropical regions worldwide. Members of the Elatinaceae family are characterized by their simple, alternate leaves and small, white or pink flowers. These plants often grow in shallow water and are often found in marshes, ponds, and streams.
